title: KUYERA KWA RA
author: ABASID 1841
description: Teaching from THE ABASID CALIPHATE collection: KUYERA KWA RA (The Holiness of RA)

verses.text: 13.KUYERA KWA RA ☀️12/01/26 Maswerawo sei
Ndino kumbirawo nguva
Chinoitika nde ichi,
Nhau ya RA ino nyanyo rwiswa ne VAPOSITORI ve masowe.
Nekuti maonero eva POROFITI anosiyana, kureva kuti havasi kuparidza denga rimwe chete
Kuti iwe mupositori ugone kuziva kuti ari kutaura idi ndeupi, uni fanira kudzokera pakutaura kwe akavamba sangano raugere
Nekuti uka tevera zve va porofiti zviri nyore kuti ne rimwe zuva uchatuka Mwari wauri kupfekera Gamenzi nekusaziva
Ndiri kuda kutaura pa musoro PEKUTI , isu nema egyptians tine hukama papi
Asi ndicha shandisa mashoko aTENZI BABA JOHANI pachavo
Zvino pakunzi futi mashoko aTenzi Baba Johani pane dambudziko ukaita zveku udzwa ne munhu
Ndosaka, nhau ya BABA JOHANI inotaurwa kwa MUREHWA ichisayana ne inotaurwa Ku GURUVE
Nekuti inhau dzeku purikirwa
Ne munhu anenge achiisa maonero ake pamusoro pe Maonero akaita Baba Johani
Isu takarangana pano tikati, group rino harisi MASOWE , asi isu tiri veku MASOWE
Pano tino tandara tichirodzana njere uye kudzoreredzana tine mutsa
Munhu ano tenderwa kuvhunza kuti RA zvinorevei, ndo zvataka vambira group rino
Saka hapana ari kupotsa
Chakaipa kutuka chiri kutendwa ne mumwe nekuti chasiyana ne chaunotenda
Pano panogona kuita munhu ari kuda kudzidzisawo zve JORODANI ano namata kuguruve
Iwe uno tevera dare ra Jakopo asi usinga tende nhau dze Jorodani unofanira kupa we Jorodani mukana wekudzidzisa
Izvitambira kana kuzviramba pachako
Hazvisi zvekuti unobva wati chi Jorodani chenyu ndi Satan
Nekuti dzimwe nguva uno gona kunge uri wrong kana right
Asi mashoko awa shandisa aha mutse mumwe wako
Chinangwa chekutaura Kuda ku MUTSA hama yako
Ndosaka tichiti makadiwo ne MUTSA
Ku MUTSA hama yako kumunzwira TSITSI otsvaga NZIRA yekumu DZORA
Inzwai ka MUTSA chinhu chikuru kudarika TSITSI
Inzwai SHONA, kusiyana kwe MUTSA ne TSITSI
Toti pane munhu adonha PASI,
Anonzwa TSITSI anodai.
Ahhhhh SHAME, kana kuto donhedza musodzi, zvopera
And zveshuwa zvinenge zvichimubata mu moyo
Asi Munhu anonzwa MUTSA aha perere pakuti SHAME,
Anotanga anzwa TSITSI , asi obva amhanya mhanya kuno MUTSA mumwe wake adonha.
Tsitsi unogona kudzinzwa asi pasina zvaunoita nadzo ,
MUTSA ndokuti wava MUTENDI
Zvisinei regai ndipinde munhau iri munhandare
Tovamba ne zvanzi Ma EGYPTIANS aka siyana nesu,
Shoko ra shandiswa hanzi ndo vaye ve uko ku ne zvema PHAROAH
Ichokwadi kuti ndo pfungwa dzine vazhinji
Asi ka, kana Baba vataura vari ve JOHANE MASOWE tinofanira kusa taura zvino fungwa ne ruzhinji, asi tino fanira kutaura zvakataurwa na BABA JOHANI
Saka isu pano se vanhu varikutsvaga IDI , tino shandisa mashoko avaka siya vanyora ivo pachavo mu tsamba dzavo
Nekuti takaona kuti tika tedza zvekuvhunza kwa nevanji kana kana vanoti takafamba naye, nhau dziri kusiyana
Ve Chishanu vazhinji vanoti baba Johani pa akazenge akunyora akanga arasika
Isu takabva zera iroro
Zvinova zvakapa kuti mabato echishanu awande
Ane maonero akasiyana
Nekuti umwe anenge achiti Johani akatumwa zvakati
Mumwe achiti zvakati
Asi zvosiyana
Saka tsamba ravo ndokupedza Nyaya
Ndakuisa TSAMBA ravanotaura zve EGYPT nezve ZIMBABWE
Ndiri kuisa page, kana muchida book ravo rose ndoisa pano, ndatenda regai nditarise mu phone 🙏🏻
Handei hedu pa 10 apo ,
Hanzi wanhu watema vakando gara mu Rhodesia vakabvepi?
Mashoko emuridzi we SANGANO ramuri kunamata
Book racho ndaisa apo, kuti musafunge kuti tiri kugadzira nyaya yeku nyepa
Pari kunzi misoro yedu yakafanana nei
Hunzi yakafanana nemifananidzo iri pamakuva eku Egypt
Takasiyana ne Egypt yema PHAROAH ,
Ivo BABA JOHANI vakati takafanana NAYO
Ndine nhau yandiri kuda kumbo rairidzawo vamwe pa musoro pe vara rekuti RA
Kuti anoti H2O , ukava vhunza kuti What is this uchi nongedzera mvura
Anoti water anogona kuti , chinhu chino nwiwa
Asi anoti H2O anotsana ngura zvaka dzama pamusoro pe mvura
Anobva ati Chinhu ichi chine ma HYDROGEN maviri ne OXYGEN imwe chete
Ndo zvakaita ma vara e shona
Regai ndikupei mufananidzo
Tine mazwi atino taura mazuva ose akafanana nekuti
Vara iri ukari patsanura unobuda nezvinhu 2
Chinonzi kuba kuita sei,
Owona kuti muchirungu
Asi nekuti takuziva kuti isu kubva kwatakaita ku EGYPT ndisu taiti zuva rinonzi RA
Saka munhu uyu ari kunzi ABA ZUVA
Kwete MWARI
Nekuti RA ahasi Mwari
Akatosikwawo
ZUVA harisi MWARI asi iSimba ra MWARI pakusika
Sei ndadaro , nekuti
Hapana chinorarama panyika pano pasina zuva
Kwete nekuti ndi Mwari
Ayewa harisi Mwari
Munozviziva here kuti zuva rikadzima hakuna chino rarama
Tarisai muone zvatino rima
Chibage chikashaya zuva chinofa
Kwete nekuti zuva ndi Mwari, asi isimba ra Mwari
Kana kuti inzira ya Mwari yekuisa hupenyu mu pasi
Ndosaka chose chauno rima unoti
Isu hatinga rambe kuti tiri kupihwa hupenyu nezuva.
Patiri kudaro hatisi kushora akari sika
Nekuti akarisika kuti ritipe hupenyu

And hatingati munhu akati tiri kupihwa hupenyu ne zuva, Mwari anga gumbuke, handiti tiri kuto kudza iye kuti chinhu chamakasika Tenzi chatiraramisa, makaita henyu Mwari munotipa hupenyu kuburikidza ne zuva ramakasika
Kana uchitenda munhu akupa Dhora, hapana pawanzi washora Mwari amushandisa kuti akupe dhora
Kana zvisina mhosva kutenda akupa dhora ,
Zvinozova mhosva sei pakutenda akupa hupenyu
Zuva ndiro rinotipa hupenyu rakapfekwa na MWARI muridzi waro
Se munhu anokupa Mota akapfekwa na MWARI muridzi wake
Toenda pakuti
KURWA = TO FIGHT
Munhu akarwa RA
Anotofa kana asina kurapiwa
RA ☀️ PIHWA
Zvese izvi hazvisi kuita kuti RA ☀️ AITE
REPLACE MWARI
Kunyangwe kumasowe tichiti
Izuva guru EMANUWERE
Pane chinoshonga nguwo ye ZUVA ratino ona, ichocho ndochisina anoziva, ndo Mwari
Zita ratinga tumidza zuva harisi riro nyaya
Vanhu vasarwe ne zita rechinhu kana re munhu , nekuti Zita harina mbonje,
Haritombonzwa kudziimbikana
Pauri kunzi kurwa RA , Hausi kurwa nezita rekuti RA, asi kurwa Nesimba Rehupenyu , ndosaka uchizonzi akafa. Vanhu voti asi airwa
Isu tikafunda mufambiro we zuva ratino ona ticha nzwisisa Mwari watisinga one
Nekuti iye akati ndari sika se chiratidzo changu mu pasi
Ukaratidzwa Photo, oti ende akanaka.
Hausi kutaura Photo
Saka tikati RA akananaka hatisi kutaura mufananidzo uri mudenga
Tiri kutaura chiri mariri chinoita kuti riite zvarinoita
Ndo saka tichi fanira kuri TENDA
Ndokuti THANK YOU
Tatenda iro tato tenda ne anoripa simba rekuita zvarinoti itira
Otherwise ukapihwa mari ne munhu oregedza kuti Thank you, oti ndinotenda chamupa kuti andipe , ingazova nyika here
Iiiii sa ka
Huyai va TENDI tivake sangano
Kureva kuti chinamato chakaitirwa vano tenda
Mvura inotendwa
Mhuka dzino tendwa
Vanhu vano tendwa
Nekuti zvose zvina MWARI mazviri
Wazvi tenda unenge watenda Mwari
Ndo mashoko,
Regai ndidai, mubate kuti izwi rakati kudii
🎶🎶🎶Tinofamba neZUVA tichotevera kana rikamira ZUVA topfugama🎶🎶🎶
fambai henyu muchengetedze MUTSA
